text: I see `linear_issues` and `github_pull_requests` but no Sentry table yet. Let me check for more tables and get the columns of the relevant ones.

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name LIKE '%sentry%' ORDER BY table_name;"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql

text: Now I have all the schema details. Let me run the three counts in parallel.
